title: stisseria deflexa
intro: Stisseria deflexa, also known as Stisseria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is an evergreen climber native to the tropical regions of Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stisseria include its ability to treat a range of ailments, such as fever, colds, and skin infections, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Stisseria is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
